backendTests.ciHeadSha: d26fd551c56737c01fcb7222eaad1169d2038d56 (merge commit of branch with main)

details.authBootstrapIntegrationTest: 1/1 PASS (updated assertion to match capability-derived /workspace for VIEWER-no-caps case)

details.credentialRotationFormFailures: 5 tests timed out (5000ms) — pre-existing, not caused by this PR (file unchanged in this branch). Likely vitest+jsdom environment latency.

details.flywayConfigChange: application-prod.yml now loads classpath:db/migration,classpath:db/vendor/{vendor} and sets baseline-on-migrate=false by default.
details.postgresMigrationTestsStatus: PASS — full Testcontainers suite ran green on CI (PostgreSQL Testcontainers Acceptance + Maven Test Suite on Linux Docker)

details.targetHostHiddenFromAnonymous: PASS — backend-status no longer returns targetHost (7 contract tests verify). PRODUCTION-VERIFIED: https://snad-app.vercel.app/api/system/backend-status returns only {configured,reachable,statusCode,checkedAt} — no 'ngrok', 'streak-train', 'onrender', 'empower', '.dev', 'targetHost', 'host', 'tunnel', 'password', 'secret', 'token' substrings present.
details.loginDestinationCapabilityGated: PASS — LoginDestinationResolverTest 9/9 covers no-caps, crm-caps, control-plane, multi-family, inactive-role. AuthBootstrapIntegrationTest updated and passing.
details.credentialEnumerationMitigated: PASS — login 401 returns identical fixed Arabic message regardless of account existence. PRODUCTION-VERIFIED: POST /api/platform/api/v1/auth/login with nonexistent-user returns 401 + 'بيانات الدخول غير صحيحة'.
details.rateLimiterAbstraction: PASS — LoginRateLimiter interface + CaffeineLoginRateLimiter + LoginRateLimitKeys (IP+account+combined, trusted-proxy policy)

playwrightTests.details: Playwright E2E & Visual Regression workflow completed with conclusion=success on merge commit d26fd551. Responsive login CSS changes verified in CI browser environment.

productionSmoke.details: Production release endpoint serves exactly the merged commit SHA. Backend is reachable through ngrok tunnel (backend-status reports reachable=true, statusCode=200). All four public endpoints return 200; login flow returns proper 401 with safe Arabic message; zero infrastructure leakage detected.

credentialRotation.details: Per task rules #9 and the security invariants: a secure password rotation for cp-admin@sanad-control-plane.internal requires (a) a credential supplied by the owner through a secure channel and (b) bootstrap execution against a running prod-profile backend with a valid CONTROL_PLANE_ADMIN_PASSWORD. Neither is provided in this session. No password was invented, logged, or stored.

managedBackendMigration.details: Backend runs locally via deploy/self-hosted/docker-compose.windows.yml. Cloud migration requires owner decision on hosting provider; not invented here.

openRisks: Rate limiter is still in-memory Caffeine. Multi-instance production must register a distributed @Primary LoginRateLimiter (Redis/Valkey adapter) — documented in CaffeineLoginRateLimiter javadoc.
Control-plane bootstrap does NOT auto-disable after operation. Operator MUST set CONTROL_PLANE_BOOTSTRAP_ENABLED=false after rotation. Pre-existing risk, not introduced here.
ngrok subdomain is random ephemeral. Recommend reserved domain or Cloudflare Tunnel for long-term production (rule 8.3 of prior CRM-007R2).
Credential rotation for cp-admin@sanad-control-plane.internal remains a BLOCKED operational step awaiting owner-supplied password through a secure channel.

Pre-existing workflow file .github/workflows/rem-p0-002-production-acceptance-v3.yml fails on every push across all branches (workflow file issue, not a code/test regression). Filed separately — out of scope for this remediation.
